prompt: autofill confidence summary banner
summary: Added dismissible banner above field list after autofill showing high/medium/low confidence counts with scroll-to CTA for low confidence fields

prompt: duplicate form from dashboard card
summary: Added POST /api/forms/[id]/duplicate endpoint and duplicate icon button on form cards; clones structure with cleared values, no quota

prompt: referral reward bonus forms on form completion
summary: ReferralReward model + awardReferralBonus() grants +2 bonus forms when referred user completes first form; ReferralCard copy updated

prompt: undo last autofill with snapshot restore
summary: 8s undo toast after autofill with snapshot of pre-autofill values/states; manual edit invalidates snapshot; 2s confirmation flash on undo

prompt: onboarding checklist 4 steps with DB persistence
summary: Added step 4 (export/share), DB-backed dismiss via onboardingDismissedAt, mobile compact bar; backfill implicit from existing DB state

prompt: Profile completeness score dashboard widget with field gap CTA (#358)
summary: Added ProfileCompletenessCard component with weighted category scoring (Identity/Contact/Address=3, DOB/Employment=2, Documents=1) — shows score %, top-3 missing categories, and CTA to /profile. Shown on dashboard when profile exists and score <100%.

prompt: Autofill error recovery UX — partial fail state with manual fallback (#364)
summary: Added skipped_fields to autofill API response, amber banner in FormViewer showing count + scroll CTA, amber ring on skipped field cards, auto-dismiss on fill, undo/clear-all integration.

prompt: Dashboard search and filter — debounce, localStorage sort, All pill (#365)
summary: Added 300ms debounce to search, localStorage persistence for sort key, and All pill to status filter. The bulk of the feature already existed.

prompt: Weekly re-engagement digest email (#361)
summary: Added weekly Monday 9am UTC cron that emails users with incomplete forms inactive >48h. WeeklyDigestEmail template, /api/cron/weekly-digest route, reused digestUnsubscribed + lastDigestSentAt.
Issue #32 done: Haptic feedback on rep completion — expo-haptics medium impact for good reps, warning notification for flagged reps, Vibration fallback. PR #37.

prompt: Pro upgrade modal — feature comparison table, plan toggle, testimonials (#360)
summary: Enhanced UpgradeGateModal with 8-row Free/Pro comparison table, monthly/annual toggle (annual default, Save 27% badge), 2 placeholder testimonials. All existing trigger points work unchanged.
Issue #34 done: Settings/About screen — 3rd tab with version, build, device info, copy bug report template.

prompt: Issue #125: automated daily MongoDB backup
summary: Created GitHub Actions workflow for daily mongodump to Cloudflare R2 with 30-day retention, Telegram notifications, and BACKUP.md restore documentation. PR #126.
Issues #33 (history delete/clear) and #35 (Android icon dark bg) done via background agents. PRs #36 #38.
Added PRODUCT.md documenting all 17 shipped features with API endpoints and acceptance criteria (#123)
Daily MongoDB backup to Cloudflare R2 via GitHub Actions (#125). Needs R2 secrets configured.

prompt: Issue #366: social proof on landing page
summary: AnimatedCounter component (IntersectionObserver, 1.5s ease-out), trust badges section (no data sold, encrypted, GDPR), /api/stats now returns formsFilledRounded

prompt: Issue #15 + #16: Activate Sentry + UptimeRobot monitoring
summary: Enhanced Sentry init with tracesSampleRate and sendDefaultPii, added /debug-sentry test endpoint, documented UptimeRobot setup in README. PR #128 merged. Manual steps: add SENTRY_DSN to Railway, configure UptimeRobot monitor.
Activated Sentry error tracking with trace sampling + documented UptimeRobot setup (#15, #16). Manual steps: add SENTRY_DSN to Railway, set up UptimeRobot monitor.

prompt: Issue #369: Product Hunt launch banner
summary: LaunchBanner component (pre-launch notify-me + launch-day PH upvote), /api/launch-notify with IP rate limit, /api/admin/launch-notify-blast with idempotency via blastSentAt
Added full-text search + category/amount filters to expenses API (#124). 25 tests.

prompt: Issue #370: demo upload without signup
summary: POST /api/demo/upload (no-auth, 5MB/3-page, rate-limited, AI analysis, no persistence), demo page upload tab with drag-drop zone and conversion CTA

prompt: #244 global error boundary + API error toasts
summary: Added ErrorBoundary component, ToastProvider with event emitter pattern for axios interceptor integration, human-readable error messages for all HTTP status codes, 401 auto-redirect to login
Added global ErrorBoundary + API error toast notifications via event emitter pattern (#244). 11 tests.

prompt: issue-129: CSV and PDF export
summary: Enhanced CSV export with full filter parity (category, q, paymentMethod, amount range). Added PDF export with pdfkit: transaction table + category summary. Shared buildExportFilter function. 26 tests passing.
Added CSV + PDF export endpoints with full filter support (#129). 26 tests. Uses pdfkit.

prompt: Issue #371: shareable certificate page
summary: OG image endpoint (1200x630, no personal data), certificate page stats+share section, /c/ short URL, autofillRate computed on completion

prompt: Issue #131: recurring expense auto-creation with scheduled job
summary: Rewrote processRecurringExpenses to use processedUntil for idempotent back-creation of missed expenses. Added nextDueDate/lastProcessedDate/processedUntil/active fields to RecurringExpense model. Added POST /api/recurring/process admin endpoint. Fixed month-end overflow bug in calculateNextOccurrence. 29 new tests, all 458 pass. PR #133.
Recurring expense auto-creation with idempotent processing + 29 tests (#131). Fixed date overflow bug.

prompt: issue-245-export-csv-pdf
summary: Added server-side CSV/PDF export buttons to transaction list. Export service functions call /api/export/csv and /api/export/pdf with active filters. Loading state and error handling via axios interceptor. PR #247.
Added CSV/PDF export buttons to transaction list with loading states (#245). Wired to backend /api/export endpoints.

prompt: #368 field mapping editor — review and fix autofill source assignments
summary: GET /api/forms/[id]/autofill/mapping + FieldMappingEditor modal with source dropdown, confidence badge, Accept All; Review Mapping button in FormViewer action bar and autofill summary banner

prompt: #367 autofill snapshot history — view and restore previous fill states
summary: FormSnapshot Prisma model, snapshot after each autofill (max 10/form), GET /snapshots + POST /restore endpoints, History button + panel modal in FormPageClient
Merged PR #39: Jest test suite with 28 tests (squat/deadlift/pushup analysis, sessionStorage, mathUtils). CI updated to run tests. Shared angleDeg extracted to mathUtils.ts (#31).
Added offline support: MMKV cache persistence, sync queue with failed/retry states, optimistic creates, offline banner with sync status (#351). 43 tests.
Progress tracking on History screen: stats header, personal bests cards with filter, score trend arrows. 12 new tests (#41). PR #45.
Added overhead press as 4th exercise with form analysis (back arch, uneven press, incomplete lockout), rep detection, camera guide. 5 tests (#44). PR #46.

prompt: Add personal data export (JSON) to Settings page
summary: Added GET /api/export/json backend endpoint returning full user data dump (expenses, recurring, templates, goals, budgets, preferences). Added Your Data section to Settings page with Download All Data button showing loading spinner. Frontend PR #250, Backend PR #136. Tests added.
Added full data export (JSON) — backend GET /api/export/json + frontend Settings download button (#249). Exports expenses, recurring, templates, goals, profile.
Rep-by-rep form breakdown on Summary: per-rep flag data, colored bars, best/worst badges, fatigue detection. 8 tests (#43). PR #47.

prompt: issue-134-auth-rate-limiting
summary: Added express-rate-limit to all auth endpoints: login 10/15min, register 5/1hr, social 20/15min. Returns 429 with JSON error and Retry-After header. Skips in test env unless ENABLE_RATE_LIMIT=true.
Added rate limiting on auth endpoints: login 10/15min, register 5/hr, social 20/15min (#134). Uses express-rate-limit.
Added PATCH /api/users/password endpoint with validation, social-auth guard, 9 tests (#135).
Rest timer + multi-set flow: RestTimer screen with circular countdown, Session shows set number, Summary shows per-set breakdown + duration (#42). PR #48.
In-app feedback form: category picker, message validation, expo-mail-composer, device info toggle. 10 tests (#50). PR #54.

prompt: Add change-password UI to Settings page (#248)
summary: Added Security section to Settings page with Change Password form. Three fields (current, new, confirm), client-side validation (min 6 chars, match), PATCH /api/users/password call, success toast, inline error handling. Hidden for social-auth users (Google/Apple). 7 new tests added. PR #251 opened.
Added change password UI to Settings with social-auth detection, inline form, 7 tests (#248).
Exercise form tips reference: ideal form, common mistakes with explanations, camera setup for all 4 exercises (#52). PR #55.
Error handling: shared ErrorState/LoadingState components, no-landmarks hint, zero-rep summary warning (#53). PR #56.

prompt: #372 form deadline reminders — due dates, email alerts, dashboard badges
summary: dueDate on Form + FormReminder cooldown table, daily cron sending reminder emails, date picker in form detail, due badges on dashboard cards, upcoming deadlines widget
